questions.question: Which build tool does Nuxt 3 use by default, replacing Webpack from Nuxt 2?
What replaced the Connect server from Nuxt 2 as the server engine in Nuxt 3?
In Nuxt 2 auto-imports were limited to components only. What does Nuxt 3 auto-import additionally?
options: Only Vue APIs like ref and computed
Only your local composables from composables/
Components, composables, utils, Vue APIs, and server utils
Third-party npm packages are also auto-imported
